creator: brian.r.haug@gmail.com
text:
on the web page http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/network-dns.html there is a link to nsupdate(8); however, the link is bad.  It appears nsupdate is listed in section 1 instead of section 8.

Fix: 

change http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=nsupdate&sektion=8 to http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=nsupdate&sektion=1
How-To-Repeat: view the page, look at section 30.6.10, the link is on the first line
